title: Origins: Player Scale
description: A datapack for Origins. Adds a Separate Origin Layer, allowing players to choose a body size in addition to the typical Origins.
body:
## Origins: Player Scale
### What's this?
This datapack adds **an independent Origin layer** that allows players to choose one of 6 sizes, or choose the standard Minecraft size.

You can play whatever classic or addon origin you like, *in addition to picking a custom size*.

The available sizes are: Normal; Small; Very Small; Tiny; Big; Very Big; Giant.

You can view all the Origin cards in Modrinth's gallery; they include flavor text, but not exact stat bonuses.

All scaling is applied with multipliers, which should help with compatibility.

Tested on 1.18.2 through 1.20.2, but as a datapack it's likely to work on most if not all Minecraft versions.

**1.20.2 is experiencing some bugs with its dependencies, as of 2023-12-8.** This isn't the only datapack affected; hopefully the issues are resolved soon!

#### In general...

Small folk fit into smaller areas, take less fall damage, and are less visible to enemies. Being small has no significant downside.

Large folk have trouble with typical buildings. As a tradeoff, they are more mobile, with better speed, jump height, step height, and reach.
With greater bulk comes greater knockback and knockback resistance, and a small amount of extra health per size. (As an example, Giant receives 6 extra hearts, and is a cumbersome 4 blocks tall.)

### This datapack requires the mod Origins, and the mod Pehkui.
- https://modrinth.com/mod/origins
- https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui
